classification.task_goal: Develop a CNN and LSTM model using Google traces usage dataset for data analysis and model comparison.
primary_constraints: Perform large descriptive data analysis on the dataset.
Clean the dataset before model development.
Develop both CNN and LSTM models.
Compare the performance of CNN and LSTM models.
classification.reasoning: The user shifted the task from the initial focus on facial recognition and heart disease classification to a new goal involving the Google dataset and model development. This is a valid adaptation as the user explicitly changed the task.
